Comfortable Accommodation: BabaJay Family Home in Dar es Salaam offers a spacious apartment with a garden and terrace. Guests enjoy free on-site private parking, air-conditioning, and a fully equipped kitchen.
Modern Amenities: The property features a shared kitchen, outdoor fireplace, and outdoor seating area. Additional amenities include a games room, children's playground, and free WiFi throughout.
Dining Options: Breakfast options include continental, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free selections with local specialities, juice, pancakes, and fruits. Dinner is available in-room or through room service.
